## Scope

<!-- Is this a ClawPort UI change, or does it require changes to OpenClaw itself? -->

- [ ] This is a **ClawPort UI** feature (dashboard, visualization, settings, etc.)
- [ ] This requires **OpenClaw** changes (agent runtime, gateway protocol, CLI commands)
- [ ] I'm not sure

> If this requires OpenClaw changes, please open the issue at [OpenClaw](https://openclaw.ai) instead. ClawPort is the UI layer -- it reads data from OpenClaw but does not control agent execution or orchestration.
